steps.t: Avabárg can be found in Woodsedge in the Vales of Anduin. You should learn the history of the Rohirrim with Léothred.
Avabárg can be found in Woodsedge in the Vales of Anduin. You should learn the history of the Rohirrim with Léothred.
Léothred can be found at Avabárg. You should talk to Léothred.
